source_pr.title: expression: make TestNowAndUTCTimestamp more stable
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/14911

### What is changed and how it works?

I expect the duration to be relatively short, it's just several function call anyway.
However, sometimes this test fail, so I increase the check to 5ms.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - No code

symptoms: PR title/body: TestNowAndUTCTimestamp sometimes fails; loosen duration assertion to make test stable
failure_signature: PR title/body: TestNowAndUTCTimestamp sometimes fails; loosen duration assertion to make test stable
root_cause_explanation: Insufficient evidence to determine the underlying root cause from the available case data; needs CI logs or a reliable repro.

evidence: evidence: PR title/body: TestNowAndUTCTimestamp sometimes fails; loosen duration assertion to make test stable
evidence: relax max allowed time delta from 3ms to 1s in TestNowAndUTCTimestamp (expression/builtin_time_test.go)
